meaning: n.发出短促刺耳声的人(或物),雏鸽
examples: Flash and Squeaker were very close friends.
She should have known because Squeaker was gentle.
She was sorry when she realized Squeaker didn't do it.
He beat Nicolas Sarkozy in a squeaker, with just 52% of the vote.
Plenty of fans undoubtedly got a kick out of Ohio University's thrashing of Georgetown and Old Dominion's squeaker over Notre Dame.
